data.title: Gensler is back from regulatory purgatory to attack crypto
data.description:
Gary Gensler, the former SEC chairman, who is mainly known as a villain in the crypto community, is back to give explanations on his governance. However, those who were waiting for an apology met a big surprise when the former regulatory chief’s tone implied that “I am proud of what we did. ” In an interview, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gensler-back-from-purgatory-to-attack-crypto/

data.title: A whale spent 2 million USDT to buy 1.825 million ASTER
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale spent 2 million USDT to buy 1.825 million ASTER in the past hour, with an average purchase price of $1.1. The whale also borrowed an additional 2 million USDT from Aave and deposited it in Aster, and may buy more ASTER.

data.title: A crypto KOL withdrew 5.57 million ASTER tokens worth $6.7 million 2 hours ago
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a crypto KOL (@CookerFlips, founder of Pastel Alphac) withdrew 5.57 million ASTER tokens worth $6.7 million 2 hours ago, making a profit of more than $5 million in just 3 days.

data.title: Watchdog Labels Trump’s Crypto Venture ‘American Sell-Out’ for Alleged North Korea, Iran Token Sales
data.description:
Government watchdog Accountable. US accused President Trump's World Liberty Financial crypto venture of selling tokens to entities linked to North Korea, Iran, and sanctioned money-laundering platforms in a report titled "American Sell-Out. "
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/watchdog-labels-trump-crypto-venture-american-sell-out-for-alleged-north-korea-iran-token-sales/

data.title: FTX to Repay $1.6B in Third Bankruptcy Distribution
data.description:
FTX creditors will receive $1. 6 billion on September 30 in the third phase of bankruptcy repayments.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/ftx-to-repay-1-6b-in-third-bankruptcy-distribution

data.title: Michael Saylor Says Bitcoin May Go ‘Boring’ as Institutional Money Kills Volatility
data.description:
MicroStrategy's Michael Saylor warned that Bitcoin's growing institutional adoption could transform the volatile asset into a "boring" store of value as corporate treasuries reached a record 1. 011 million BTC worth over $118 billion.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/michael-saylor-says-bitcoin-may-go-boring-as-institutional-money-kills-volatility/

data.title: BitGo Becomes First Crypto Custodian to File for US IPO
data.description:
BitGo has filed for an initial public offering (IPO), becoming the first crypto custodian to pursue a listing on a US stock exchange.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitgo-becomes-first-crypto-custodian-to-file-for-us-ipo/

data.title: Hong Kong-listed company Central New Energy Holdings Group plans to explore new energy digital assets and other fields.
data.description: According to an announcement from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, Zhonghuan New Energy Holdings Group, a Hong Kong-listed company, announced that it has entered into a strategic cooperation framework agreement with Ant Blockchain Technology (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., intending to explore areas such as new energy digital assets and new energy artificial intelligence ecology. Ant Blockchain will provide technical support in blockchain technology, full-link solutions for data assets, artificial intelligence large models and ecological integration.

data.title: Blockchain gaming company Immutable announces shift to a mobile-first strategy
data.description: Blockchain gaming company Immutable has announced a shift to a "mobile-first" strategy and the establishment of a mobile gaming division to accelerate mainstream adoption of Web 3 games and simplify on-chain product integration for mobile developers. The company also plans to invest in mobile gaming studios within the Immutable ecosystem, but has not yet disclosed specific investment details. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Up To $4,250 Per Person To Be Handed Out As California Firm Reaches Data Breach Settlement
data.description:
A California-based real estate firm has agreed to settle a lawsuit over a data breach that exposed the sensitive information of its customers. According to the settlement administrator’s portal, FPI Management will pay out between $100 and $4,250 to victims of the breach, which happened five years ago.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/20/up-to-4250-per-person-to-be-handed-out-as-california-firm-reaches-data-breach-settlement/

data.title: CZ: France has seen a decline in public security over the past few years, with numerous crypto kidnappings occurring. I hope the situation will improve.
data.description: After Binance co-founder CZ posted on the X platform revealing his early donation to the Notre Dame Cathedral restoration fundraiser, he added that he hoped this move would help make France safer to some extent. He said that France has indeed experienced a decline in public security in the past few years, with multiple crypto kidnappings and the "Telegram founder Pavel Durov investigation," but he still hopes the situation will improve.
